flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bay Mills Community College fell 47% between 2019 and 2021 (75.0% → 40.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bay Mills Community College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (33.9% → 30.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Bay Mills Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (544 → 662).
